current_workflow_components.limitation: Not machine-verifiable; relies on agent compliance
1KB pointer delegating to _submit_new_chat_with_attachment_strict.py; actual implementation has hardcoded paths and is not parameterized for reuse across tasks
msgs.last capture can grab wrong assistant message in continuation conversations; lacks before_assistant_count guard and run_id hard gate (R1 incident: captured assistant[3] instead of assistant[4])

gaps.name: process_state_machine
gaps.description: No machine-readable state machine defining task lifecycle states and transitions
gaps.proposed_solution: Create PROCESS_STATE_MACHINE.md (human-readable) and PROCESS_STATE_MACHINE.json (machine-readable) defining states: draft, gate_passing, gpt_reviewing, accepted, accepted_with_limitation, blocked, human_required, closed with transition conditions and irreversible constraints

gaps.name: changed_files_proof_standardization
gaps.description: CHANGED_FILES evidence format inconsistent across tasks (txt/json/md variants)
gaps.proposed_solution: Define CHANGED_FILES_SCHEMA.json with unified fields: path, change_type, sha256_before, sha256_after, tracked, git_porcelain_status

gaps.name: gpt_attachment_submitter_parameterization
gaps.description: gpt_new_chat_attachment_submit.py is a 1KB pointer; not parameterized for reuse across tasks
gaps.proposed_solution: Parameterize with: task_id, pack_path, run_id_path, output_path, prompt_template

gaps.name: gpt_capture_reconciliation_report
gaps.description: No end-to-end reconciliation of submissions vs captures vs verdicts
gaps.proposed_solution: Create GPT_CAPTURE_RECONCILIATION_REPORT mapping all run_ids to submissions, captures, and verdicts

gaps.name: gpt_review_regression_tests
gaps.description: Key gate scripts lack regression test coverage for edge cases
gaps.proposed_solution: Create test suite covering: missing run_id, missing END_OF_GPT_RESPONSE, empty file, verdict flattening, stale reply

gaps.name: human_required_decision_record_template
gaps.description: No structured template for recording human intervention decisions
gaps.proposed_solution: Create HUMAN_REQUIRED_DECISION_RECORD_TEMPLATE.json with fields for decision context, risk assessment, authorization, and outcome

gaps.name: startup_read_gate_machine_verification
gaps.description: Startup read gate is guidance-only; no machine-verifiable check
gaps.proposed_solution: Create scripts/verify_startup_read_proof.py that validates startup proof JSON exists and all required reads are present

gaps.name: project_governance_dashboard
gaps.description: No unified view of project governance state across all tasks
gaps.proposed_solution: Optional HTML/MD dashboard aggregating all task verdicts, limitations, and next actions

gaps.name: next_task_authorization_chain_break
gaps.description: R4 next_task_authorization is none/unauthorized; automation chain is broken
gaps.proposed_solution: Requires user decision to authorize next task; plan task fills this gap by proposing candidates

gaps.name: capture_mechanism_hardening
gaps.description: msgs.last.inner_text() can grab wrong assistant message in continuation conversations. R1 incident: captured assistant[3] (Qwen prompt template) instead of assistant[4] (actual verdict). Must use before_assistant_count baseline + run_id matching as authoritative capture method.
gaps.proposed_solution: 1) Record before_assistant_count before submit. 2) Only scan assistant messages with index >= before_assistant_count. 3) Use exact run_id + task_id + END_OF_GPT_RESPONSE as hard gate. 4) Record capture_mismatch when last != selected. 5) Add GPT_CAPTURE_RECONCILIATION_REPORT per submission. 6) Add regression test case: continuation_conversation_last_assistant_stale. Rule: last assistant is not authoritative; target run_id match is authoritative.
